---
title: "Survey Instrument Report"
subtitle: "`r params$instrument$meta$title` — v`r params$instrument$meta$version`"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-title: "Contents"
    embed-resources: true
    theme: cosmo
    mainfont: "Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif"
    fontsize: 15px
    code-fold: true
params:
  instrument_path: ""
  data_path: ""
  include_codebook: true
  include_quality: true
  include_reliability: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
library(surveyframe)
library(knitr)
library(tibble)

instrument <- readRDS(params$instrument_path)

has_data <- nzchar(params$data_path) && file.exists(params$data_path)
responses <- if (has_data) readRDS(params$data_path) else NULL
```

---

*Generated by [surveyframe](https://github.com/MohammedAliSharafuddin/surveyframe).
Reproduce this report by calling `render_report()` with the same instrument and
data files.*

---

```{r instrument-meta}
#| output: asis
meta <- instrument$meta
cat(sprintf("**Description:** %s\n\n", meta$description %||% "Not provided"))
cat(sprintf("**Authors:** %s\n\n", paste(meta$authors %||% "Not specified", collapse = ", ")))
cat(sprintf("**Languages:** %s\n\n", paste(meta$languages, collapse = ", ")))
cat(sprintf("**Validation status:** %s\n\n",
            if (isTRUE(meta$validated)) "Valid" else "Not validated"))
```

---

```{r codebook, eval=params$include_codebook}
#| output: asis
cat("## Codebook\n\n")
```

```{r codebook-items, eval=params$include_codebook}
#| tbl-cap: "Survey items"
cb <- codebook_report(instrument)

items_display <- cb$items_table
items_display$reverse  <- ifelse(items_display$reverse,  "Yes", "")
items_display$required <- ifelse(items_display$required, "Yes", "")

kable(
  items_display,
  col.names = c("ID", "Label", "Type", "Choice set", "Scale", "Reverse", "Required"),
  align     = c("l", "l", "l", "l", "l", "c", "c")
)
```

```{r codebook-choices, eval=params$include_codebook && nrow(cb$choices_table) > 0}
#| tbl-cap: "Choice sets"
kable(
  cb$choices_table,
  col.names = c("Choice set ID", "Value", "Label"),
  align     = c("l", "l", "l")
)
```

```{r codebook-scales, eval=params$include_codebook && nrow(cb$scales_table) > 0}
#| tbl-cap: "Scale definitions"
kable(
  cb$scales_table,
  col.names = c("Scale ID", "Label", "Method", "Items (n)", "Item IDs"),
  align     = c("l", "l", "l", "c", "l")
)
```

---

```{r quality-heading, eval=params$include_quality && has_data}
#| output: asis
cat("## Data Quality\n\n")
```

```{r quality, eval=params$include_quality && has_data}
qr <- quality_report(responses, instrument)

cat(sprintf(
  "**Respondents:** %d | **Items checked:** %d | **Flagged:** %d (%.1f%%)\n\n",
  qr$summary$n_respondents,
  qr$summary$n_items,
  qr$summary$n_flagged,
  qr$summary$flag_rate * 100
))
```

```{r quality-attention, eval=params$include_quality && has_data && length(qr$attention) > 0}
#| tbl-cap: "Attention check results"
attn_df <- do.call(rbind, lapply(qr$attention, function(a) {
  data.frame(
    Check    = a$check_id,
    Type     = a$type,
    Pass_rate = sprintf("%.1f%%", a$pass_rate * 100),
    Failures  = a$n_fail,
    Action    = a$fail_action,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}))
kable(attn_df, align = c("l", "l", "r", "r", "l"))
```

```{r quality-missing, eval=params$include_quality && has_data}
#| output: asis
miss_pct <- mean(
  qr$missing$respondent_miss > qr$missing$flagged_threshold,
  na.rm = TRUE
) * 100

cat(sprintf(
  "**Respondent-level missingness:** %.1f%% of respondents have more than %.0f%% missing items.\n\n",
  miss_pct,
  qr$missing$flagged_threshold * 100
))

item_miss <- qr$missing$item_miss_rate
high_miss <- item_miss[item_miss > 0.1]
if (length(high_miss) > 0) {
  cat("Items with more than 10% missing values:\n\n")
  miss_df <- data.frame(
    Item         = names(high_miss),
    Missing_rate = sprintf("%.1f%%", high_miss * 100),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  print(kable(miss_df, align = c("l", "r")))
} else {
  cat("No items exceed 10% missing values.\n\n")
}
```

```{r sl-results, eval=params$include_quality && has_data && length(qr$straightline) > 0}
#| tbl-cap: "Straight-lining by scale"
sl_df <- do.call(rbind, lapply(qr$straightline, function(s) {
  data.frame(
    Scale         = s$scale_id,
    Items         = s$n_items,
    Flagged_rate  = sprintf("%.1f%%", s$flag_rate * 100),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}))
kable(sl_df, align = c("l", "c", "r"))
```

---

```{r reliability-heading, eval=params$include_reliability && has_data}
#| output: asis
cat("## Reliability Diagnostics\n\n")
```

```{r reliability, eval=params$include_reliability && has_data}
rr <- reliability_report(responses, instrument)

if (length(rr) == 0) {
  cat("No scales with two or more matching response columns found.\n\n")
} else {
  rel_df <- do.call(rbind, lapply(rr, function(s) {
    data.frame(
      Scale   = paste0(s$label, " (", s$scale_id, ")"),
      N_items = s$n_items,
      N       = s$n,
      Alpha   = if (!is.null(s$alpha))   sprintf("%.3f", s$alpha)   else "n/a",
      Omega_h = if (!is.null(s$omega_h)) sprintf("%.3f", s$omega_h) else "n/a",
      Omega_t = if (!is.null(s$omega_t)) sprintf("%.3f", s$omega_t) else "n/a",
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }))

  kable(
    rel_df,
    col.names = c("Scale", "Items", "N", "Alpha", "Omega (h)", "Omega (total)"),
    align     = c("l", "c", "c", "r", "r", "r"),
    caption   = "Scale reliability statistics"
  )
}
```

---

## Reproducibility note

```{r repro-note}
#| output: asis
cat(sprintf(
  "Instrument hash: `%s`\n\n",
  tryCatch(
    jsonlite::fromJSON(
      write(jsonlite::toJSON(list(h = ""), auto_unbox = TRUE), tempfile())
    )$h,
    error = function(e) "see .sframe file"
  )
))

cat(sprintf("Report generated: %s\n\n", format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M %Z")))
cat("To reproduce this report:\n\n")
cat("```r\nlibrary(surveyframe)\n")
cat("instr <- read_sframe(\"your_instrument.sframe\")\n")
cat("responses <- read_responses(\"your_responses.csv\", instr)\n")
cat("render_report(instr, data = responses, output_file = \"report.html\")\n```\n\n")
```
